calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants James Gepalaga, an individual and Tanya Gepalaga, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brittni Christopher, CSR #10791. Telephone: 415-551-3745. Email: bchristopher@sftc.org.

Raymond E. Kong, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sutro Heights Residential Care, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Anna Shvartser, Administrator for plaintiff Sutro Heights Residential Care, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants James Gepalaga or Tanya Gepalaga.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract/open book account was filed on April 9, 2018, and personally served on defendant James Gepalaga on April 23, 2018.
Plaintiff's complaint was personally served on defendant Tanya Gepalaga on April 24, 2018.
Defaults as to defendants James Gepalaga and Tanya Gepalaga were entered on May 24, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 12, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sutro Heights Residential Care, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants James Gepalaga, an individual and Tanya Gepalaga, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $108,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,800.00.
Costs - $831.70.

Total - $119,631.70.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
